LanguageData.Ammo_M41Rocket_HEAT.label: M41 rocket (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_M41Rocket_HEAT.description: Rockets designed for the M41 launcher. After being fired, a rocket motor kicks in to propel the Rocket further.
LanguageData.Ammo_M41Rocket_HE.label: M41 Rocket (Anti-personnel)
LanguageData.Ammo_M41Rocket_HE.description: Rockets designed for the M41 launcher. After being fired, a rocket motor kicks in to propel the Rocket further.
LanguageData.Bullet_M41Rocket_HEAT.label: M19 102mm missile (HEAT)
LanguageData.Bullet_M41Rocket_HE.label: M21 102mm missile (Anti-Personnel)
